task.name: numeric_function_discovery
task.goal: Infer a compact mathematical or statistical model for the observed one-dimensional measurements.

samples.description: Fit and explain the configured observations.csv file.
Check residuals, uncertainty, and overfitting risk.

metric.name: model_quality
metric.description: Reward compact models with strong evidence, reproducibility, and honest uncertainty.
metric.command: conda run -n myenv python -c "print('executor should run the configured analysis, then report evidence')"

checks.name: reproducible_analysis
checks.command: conda run -n myenv python -c "import csv; rows=list(csv.reader(open('examples/function_discovery/data/observations.csv'))); assert rows"
checks.success_criteria: Analysis uses only configured observations and produces reproducible evidence.

evidence.guidance: Create compact diagnostics only when they help prove or falsify the model.
